info_page.title: Information
info_page.description:
• The minimum amount that can be withdrawn per transaction is 1000$.
  • The maximum amount that can be withdrawn per transaction is 1,000,000$.
  • The transaction fee is 5%.
  • Withdrawals up to 50,000$ per day are free, with a maximum of 2 free transactions per day.
  • The minimum fee amount is 100$.
  • The daily limit is 100,000$, but there is no limit on the number of daily transactions.
